name: contentforge
description: Enterprise content production pipeline with 13 agents, 19 skills, and 9 opt-in HTTP connectors. v3.9 supercharges the Phase 6.5 humanizer with a 29-pattern AI-detection catalog (adapted from Wikipedia: Signs of AI writing + blader/humanizer), a self-critique meta-pass, and optional voice calibration. Multi-plugin coexistence fixes: ships zero global hooks and zero auto-connecting MCP servers — checks live in agents, connectors are opt-in via cf-connect.
